title: Custom Entities in Minecraft
description: A complete step-by-step guide to creating and controlling entities with full explanations, structure, AI, events, and debugging.

lessons.title: Entity Basics (FULL GUIDE)
lessons.content:
# Entity Basics (FULL GUIDE)

## Step 1: Where This Code Goes

Open your command class OR test command
→ Inside onCommand()

---

## Step 2: What is an Entity?

Entity = anything that exists in the world and can move or interact

Examples:
- Players
- Zombies
- Arrows

---

## Step 3: Code (Spawn Entity)

```java
World world = player.getWorld();
world.spawnEntity(player.getLocation(), EntityType.ZOMBIE);
```

---

## Step 4: FULL Breakdown

World world = player.getWorld();
→ gets world player is in

spawnEntity(location, type)
→ creates entity

EntityType.ZOMBIE
→ defines what to spawn

---

## Step 5: What Happens In-Game

A zombie spawns at player location

---

## Step 6: Common Mistakes

❌ Spawning inside block → suffocation
❌ Spawning too many → lag

---

## Mini Challenge
Spawn a cow instead

## Recap
World → spawn → entity type

quiz.question: What is an entity?
options: Any object that moves or interacts

lessons.title: Custom Names & Appearance
lessons.content:
# Custom Names (FULL GUIDE)

## Step 1: Code

```java
Entity zombie = player.getWorld().spawnEntity(player.getLocation(), EntityType.ZOMBIE);
zombie.setCustomName("§cBoss Zombie");
zombie.setCustomNameVisible(true);
```

---

## Step 2: FULL Breakdown

setCustomName(...)
→ gives entity a name

§c
→ color code (red)

setCustomNameVisible(true)
→ shows name above head

---

## Step 3: What Happens

Zombie appears with red name above it

---

## Step 4: Beginner Mistake

❌ Forgetting setCustomNameVisible
→ name won't show

---

## Mini Challenge
Make name blue (§9)

## Recap
Name + visible = custom mob

lessons.title: Custom Health & Stats
lessons.content:
# Health & Stats (FULL GUIDE)

## Step 1: IMPORTANT CONCEPT

Not all entities support health.

You MUST use LivingEntity.

---

## Step 2: Code

```java
LivingEntity zombie = (LivingEntity) player.getWorld().spawnEntity(player.getLocation(), EntityType.ZOMBIE);

zombie.setMaxHealth(40.0);
zombie.setHealth(40.0);

zombie.getAttribute(Attribute.GENERIC_MOVEMENT_SPEED).setBaseValue(0.35);
```

---

## Step 3: FULL Breakdown

(LivingEntity)
→ casting (changing type)

setMaxHealth
→ total health

setHealth
→ current health

getAttribute(...)
→ access stats

setBaseValue
→ changes stat

---

## Step 4: Why Casting Is Needed

spawnEntity returns Entity

BUT health only exists on LivingEntity

---

## Step 5: What Happens

Zombie:
- has more HP
- moves faster

---

## Step 6: Common Mistakes

❌ Not casting → cannot use health methods

---

## Mini Challenge
Double movement speed

## Recap
Entity → cast → modify stats

lessons.title: Entity Events (FULL GUIDE)
lessons.content:
# Entity Events (FULL GUIDE)

## Step 1: Create Listener Class

EntityListener.java

---

## Step 2: Code

```java
public class EntityListener implements Listener {

    @EventHandler
    public void onEntityDamage(EntityDamageEvent event) {
        Entity entity = event.getEntity();

        if (entity.getCustomName() != null && entity.getCustomName().equals("§cBoss Zombie")) {
            event.setDamage(event.getDamage() * 0.5);
        }
    }
}
```

---

## Step 3: Register Listener

In Main.java:

```java
getServer().getPluginManager().registerEvents(new EntityListener(), this);
```

---

## Step 4: FULL Breakdown

@EventHandler
→ marks event

EntityDamageEvent
→ runs when entity damaged

getEntity()
→ gets entity hit

setDamage
→ modifies damage

---

## Step 5: What Happens

Boss zombie takes HALF damage

---

## Step 6: Common Mistake

❌ Not registering event → nothing happens

---

## Mini Challenge
Make it take DOUBLE damage

quiz.question: Event fired when entity takes damage?
How to detect a specific entity?

lessons.title: Custom AI & Behavior
lessons.content:
# AI & Behavior (FULL GUIDE)

## Step 1: Code

```java
Zombie zombie = (Zombie) player.getWorld().spawnEntity(player.getLocation(), EntityType.ZOMBIE);

zombie.setAI(false);
zombie.setInvisible(true);
```

---

## Step 2: FULL Breakdown

setAI(false)
→ disables movement

setInvisible(true)
→ hides entity

---

## Step 3: What Happens

Zombie:
- does not move
- cannot be seen

---

## Step 4: Why Use This

- Boss mechanics
- Traps
- Custom mobs

---

## Step 5: Common Mistake

❌ Invisible mobs confusing players

---

## Mini Challenge
Create invisible boss

## Recap
AI controls behaviour

lessons.title: Custom Drops & Loot
lessons.content:
# Custom Drops (FULL GUIDE)

## Step 1: Code

```java
@EventHandler
public void onEntityDeath(EntityDeathEvent event) {
    Entity entity = event.getEntity();

    if (entity.getCustomName() != null && entity.getCustomName().equals("§cBoss Zombie")) {
        event.getDrops().clear();
        event.getDrops().add(new ItemStack(Material.DIAMOND, 5));
    }
}
```

---

## Step 2: FULL Breakdown

getDrops()
→ list of drops

clear()
→ removes default

add(...)
→ adds custom item

---

## Step 3: What Happens

Boss zombie drops diamonds

---

## Step 4: Common Mistakes

❌ Not clearing drops → duplicates

---

## Mini Challenge
Drop emeralds instead

## Recap
Control loot system
